name: agents-shipgate-errors
description: Machine-readable enumeration of error kinds emitted by `agents-shipgate` when `AGENTS_SHIPGATE_AGENT_MODE=1` is set. Coding agents fetch this file to pre-load the recovery vocabulary instead of pattern-matching on prose. The catalog is stable for `0.x`: error-kind ids will not change in minor versions, and additions are pinned by the public-surface contract test against AGENTS.md and the codebase.
stderr_format: Single JSON line, one object per emitted error. Always carries an `error` field naming the kind plus `next_action` (single-string back-compat) and `next_actions` (ranked array). Additional fields per kind are command-dependent and may be absent when they are not relevant.

exit_codes.2: configuration, catalog lookup, or patch-payload error (config_error, config_already_exists, unknown_check_id, unknown_fingerprint, malformed_patch)
exit_codes.5: apply-patches containment violation (covered by other_error in agent mode)

errors.description: The manifest is missing or invalid: file not found, YAML parse error, schema-validation failure, or unsupported version.
errors.typical_cause: shipgate.yaml does not exist OR exists but the loader rejected it (extra key, missing required field, wrong nesting level).
errors.recovery_hint: Distinguish missing vs. invalid via the diagnostic id: `SHIP-DIAG-MISSING-MANIFEST` → run `agents-shipgate detect --workspace <dir> --json` then `init --write`. `SHIP-DIAG-INVALID-MANIFEST` → edit the manifest at the path in the error; do NOT re-run `init` (it refuses to overwrite an existing file).

errors.typical_cause: The repo already has a manifest. Initializing fresh would clobber it.
errors.recovery_hint: Read the existing manifest. If it's stale, hand-edit it. If you want a fresh template anyway, delete the existing file first. `init --write` is intentionally write-once.

errors.description: A referenced input file or output path could not be read, parsed, validated, or safely resolved.
errors.typical_cause: scan/doctor found a bad tool_sources[].path, explain-finding/scenario was pointed at a missing or incompatible report, or scenario --out was not a writable file path.
errors.recovery_hint: Follow `next_actions[]`. For scan/doctor tool-source failures, run `agents-shipgate doctor -c shipgate.yaml --json` to inspect `unresolved_sources[]`. For report-consuming commands, inspect `source_report` when present (or the `--from` path in the message) and regenerate a current `report.json` if needed.

errors.description: `explain <CHECK_ID>` was called with an id that doesn't exist in the loaded catalog.
errors.typical_cause: Typo, a check id from a plugin that isn't loaded, or a check id that was renamed/removed.
errors.recovery_hint: Use `suggestion` (close-match from `difflib`) when present. Otherwise run `agents-shipgate list-checks --json` to enumerate the loaded catalog.

errors.description: `explain-finding <FINGERPRINT>` was called with a fingerprint that doesn't match any entry in the supplied report.
errors.typical_cause: Stale fingerprint from an older scan, typo, or the report was generated from a different workspace.
errors.recovery_hint: Use `suggestion` (close-match from `difflib`) when present. Otherwise read `findings[].fingerprint` in `source_report` to find the right id; fingerprints are stable across scans for the same `(check_id, tool_name, evidence)` tuple.

errors.description: `apply-patches --from <report>` was called with a report that cannot be read, parsed as JSON, or validated against the Patch schema.
errors.typical_cause: `--from` points at a missing/non-JSON file, the report is too old (pre-v0.6), the scan omitted `--suggest-patches`, or the report was hand-edited.
errors.recovery_hint: Verify `--from` points at a readable report.json, then re-run the scan with `--suggest-patches` to regenerate a valid patch payload.

errors.description: Catch-all for application-layer errors that aren't config / input / unknown-id failures.
errors.typical_cause: Filesystem permission, output-directory not writable, scenario-input failure, or an apply-patches containment violation (which exits 5 in some paths).
errors.recovery_hint: Read the `next_action` / `next_actions` fields. If the cause is unclear, re-run with `--verbose` to surface the underlying exception.

errors.description: Unexpected exception in the scanner itself. Should be reported as a bug.
errors.typical_cause: A bug in the scanner; the loader, check engine, or reporter raised an uncaught exception.
errors.recovery_hint: File an issue at https://github.com/ThreeMoonsLab/agents-shipgate/issues with the message and a minimal reproduction. Re-run with `--verbose` to capture the traceback.

next_action_kinds.command: Concrete CLI invocation the agent can run as-is.
next_action_kinds.edit: Open and edit a specific file (path field carries the target).
next_action_kinds.review: Read a file or output and decide; no machine-applicable change.
next_action_kinds.stop: Negative-control action: stop this flow because the workspace or input is intentionally out of scope.
